nasb.text: “I loathe my own life; I will give full vent to my complaint; I will speak in the bitterness of my soul.

esv.text: “I loathe my life; I will give free utterance to my complaint; I will speak in the bitterness of my soul.

cnv.text: “我厭惡我的性命， 我要盡情吐苦水， 傾訴心中的痛苦。

ccb.text: “我厌恶自己的生命， 我要倾诉我的哀怨， 吐露心中的苦水。
